mapper.select: SELECT id, uis_code, uis_name, ip_version, ip_pattern, max_concurrent, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, uis_code, uis_name, ip_version, ip_pattern, max_concurrent, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY uis_code
SELECT id, uis_code, uis_name, ip_version, ip_pattern, max_concurrent, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, uis_code, uis_name, ip_version, ip_pattern, max_concurrent, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG WHERE ip_pattern = #{ipPattern} AND is_enabled = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG (uis_code, uis_name, ip_version, ip_pattern, max_concurrent, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{uisCode}, #{uisName}, #{ipVersion}, #{ipPattern}, #{maxConcurrent}, #{isEnabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG SET uis_name = #{uisName}, ip_version = #{ipVersion}, ip_pattern = #{ipPattern}, max_concurrent = #{maxConcurrent}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode}
UPDATE TBL_IP_AUTH_CONFIG SET max_concurrent = #{maxConcurrent}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE uis_code = #{uisCode}
